name: anchorpoint
description: Codex plugin for durable local coding-agent job lifecycle tools.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn and supervise local coding-agent jobs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Anchorpoint exposes durable local lifecycle tools for Claude Code and OpenCode jobs. It keeps provider and model configuration in the upstream agent runtime while Codex receives job handles for run, status, wait, result, continue, kill, and cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Use Anchorpoint to run an OpenCode job.
